templates.body_spintax: Hi {[first_name]|there}, we made a free 30-sec video for [business_name] using your best Google review. {Check it out|Watch it here|Have a look}: [video_url] — The [brand_name] Team
templates.followup1_body_spintax: Hi {[first_name]|there}, just following up on the free video we made for [business_name]: [video_url] — happy to {chat|talk} if you're interested in more. {Thanks|Best} — [brand_name]
templates.followup2_body_spintax: Hi {[first_name]|there}, last message re: the free video for [business_name]: [video_url] — {no worries if not for you|all good if timing's not right}. {Thanks|Best} — [brand_name]

templates.body_spintax: Hey {[first_name]|there}! {Saw|Noticed} [business_name] has {great|fantastic} Google reviews — we turned one from [review_author] into a free video: [video_url] 🎬 The [brand_name] Team
templates.followup1_body_spintax: Hey {[first_name]|there}, did you get a chance to see the video we made for [business_name]? [video_url] — {totally free to keep|yours to use however you like}. {Thanks|Best} — [brand_name]
templates.followup2_body_spintax: Hey {[first_name]|there}, {last one from me|one last message} — free video for [business_name]: [video_url] — {no hard feelings if not interested|all good if timing isn't right}. {Cheers|Best} — [brand_name]
